---
title: "CV"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<section class="editorial-page">
  <div class="editorial-page-head">
    <div class="editorial-page-index">/CV</div>
    <h1>Curriculum Vitae</h1>
  </div>

  <section class="editorial-block editorial-two-col">
    <div class="editorial-text">
      <p class="editorial-intro">
        This page presents a concise overview of my academic background, developing skills, and professional direction.
      </p>
      <p>
        My interests are centred on business analysis, process improvement, marketing strategy, and professional communication.
      </p>
      <div class="editorial-actions">
        <a class="editorial-btn primary" href="images/Sophia-CV.pdf" target="_blank">Open CV</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="editorial-media">
      <img src="images/profile.JPG" alt="Sophia Sufei Chen portrait">
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="editorial-grid editorial-grid-three">
    <article class="editorial-cell">
      <h3>Education</h3>
      <p>Final-year Business Studies student at Dublin City University with growing focus on analytical and business-facing work.</p>
    </article>
    <article class="editorial-cell">
      <h3>Skills</h3>
      <p>Business analysis, communication, Excel, structured problem solving, presentation, and professional development through online learning.</p>
    </article>
    <article class="editorial-cell">
      <h3>Career Direction</h3>
      <p>Interested in graduate opportunities and roles that combine analytical thinking, communication, and business improvement.</p>
    </article>
  </section>
</section>
```
